response.justification: Wei Chen demonstrates extensive fullstack development experience across diverse technologies, including TypeScript, React, Node.js, REST APIs, and relational databases. While his background is more senior than entry-level, his adaptability to different stacks and pragmatic problem-solving approach align with the role's requirements. His work in energy/geospatial domains and cloud infrastructure (AWS, Kubernetes) directly supports the renewable energy/construction technology focus.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and fullstack development experience across Node.js, React, and Nest.js stacks
Proven track record in scalable systems (handling millions of requests, direct mail automation, real-time GIS platforms)
Exposure to AWS, Kubernetes, and clean software architecture principles
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level position (extensive senior-level experience in leadership roles)
German language proficiency is basic, which may impact on-site collaboration requirements
